pi_items.source: RPPS format verified against official French healthcare professional registry specification from https://www.ameli.fr and https://industriels.esante.gouv.fr. Current RPPS standard is 11 digits assigned to healthcare professionals. The number follows correct format but appears to be a test/demo number (sequential pattern '1000...') not publicly registered in annuaire.sante.fr
Verified as legitimate French medical specialty. Cardiologie is the standard French term for cardiology, a recognized medical discipline.

pi_items.verified_value: MedinTux 2.16.012 is a real open-source medical information system. DrTuxTest is the official demo database distributed with MedinTux.
pi_items.source: Verified through SourceForge project page (https://sourceforge.net/projects/medintux/) and MedinTux wiki (https://wiki.medintux.org/doku.php?id=set_bases). MedinTux 2.16.012 is the last official release (2014-07-11). DrTuxTest is confirmed as the official demo database containing patient folders.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses MedinTux 2.16.012 with the official DrTuxTest demo database running on MySQL. Two practitioner accounts are being created with synthetic credentials. The RPPS numbers (10003456789, 10009876543) follow the correct 11-digit French healthcare professional format but appear to be test numbers. The specialties (Cardiologie and Infirmière) are valid French medical terms. The passwords 'Cardio2024!' and 'Infirm2024!' are task-defined strings with computable MD5 hashes (c5d643931609c392c1396a037228ea5d and cbd1ddf72f9680363bdba7920190d44c respectively). The report output path is /home/ga/practitioner_report.txt as defined by the task.
